Trait.name: Smoker
Trait.label: Smoker
Trait.description: Regularly smokes tobacco, craving cigarettes to remain calm and focused.

Trait.name: Chain Smoker
Trait.label: Chain Smoker
Trait.description: Smokes constantly and heavily, suffering severe cravings without a steady supply.

Trait.name: Alcoholic
Trait.label: Alcoholic
Trait.description: Depends heavily on alcohol, suffering withdrawal and cravings without regular drinking.

Trait.name: Drug Addict
Trait.label: Drug Addict
Trait.description: Depends on a substance to function normally, suffering severe withdrawal without it.

Trait.name: Gambler
Trait.label: Gambler
Trait.description: Compulsively seeks out games of chance, often risking more than they can afford to lose.

Trait.name: Glutton
Trait.label: Glutton
Trait.description: Regularly overeats, finding it difficult to resist food even when full.

Trait.name: Ascetic
Trait.label: Ascetic
Trait.description: Deliberately lives with minimal comfort and possessions, favoring restraint and simplicity.

Trait.name: Vegetarian
Trait.label: Vegetarian
Trait.description: Refuses to eat meat, relying entirely on plant-based foods.

Trait.name: Workaholic
Trait.label: Workaholic
Trait.description: Constantly driven to work, struggling to relax or disengage from tasks.

Trait.name: Hoarder
Trait.label: Hoarder
Trait.description: Compulsively collects and keeps possessions, refusing to discard even useless items.

Trait.name: Minimalist
Trait.label: Minimalist
Trait.description: Prefers to own as little as possible, valuing simplicity over accumulation.

Trait.name: Neat Freak
Trait.label: Neat Freak
Trait.description: Obsessively keeps their surroundings clean and organized at all times.

Trait.name: Slob
Trait.label: Slob
Trait.description: Shows little regard for cleanliness or order in their living space.

Trait.name: Loner
Trait.label: Loner
Trait.description: Prefers solitude and actively avoids spending time around others.

Trait.name: Socialite
Trait.label: Socialite
Trait.description: Thrives on social gatherings and constantly seeks the company of others.

Trait.name: Thrill-Seeker
Trait.label: Thrill-Seeker
Trait.description: Constantly pursues excitement and danger, growing restless without it.

Trait.name: Sedentary
Trait.label: Sedentary
Trait.description: Prefers minimal physical activity, favoring rest and stillness over exertion.

Trait.name: Fitness Enthusiast
Trait.label: Fitness Enthusiast
Trait.description: Maintains a rigorous exercise routine and prioritizes physical conditioning.

Trait.name: Frugal Living
Trait.label: Frugal Living
Trait.description: Spends as little as possible, carefully rationing money and resources.

Trait.name: Extravagant Living
Trait.label: Extravagant Living
Trait.description: Spends freely and lavishly, rarely holding back on comfort or luxury.

Trait.name: Wanderer
Trait.label: Wanderer
Trait.description: Rarely stays in one place for long, preferring a nomadic way of life.

Trait.name: Recluse
Trait.label: Recluse
Trait.description: Withdraws from society entirely, living apart from others by choice.
